ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_broader","terminology_alignment":"neutral_descriptive_preferred","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":[],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the overt 咁／噉 profile; remove, quarantine, or separately internalize the bare reduplicated fallback before any promotion review"}

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_narrower_defensible","terminology_alignment":"misleading","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":["semantic_domain_name_requires_structural_scope_check"],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DitransitiveSpeechVP makes two claims the evidence does not settle: that the sequence is syntactically ditransitive and that it forms a productive speech-verb class. The current matcher is an exact lexical 話…知 profile. WaaParticipantZiCommunicationVP names the overt sequence and domain without resolving the competing complement or serial analyses. Status recommendation: migrate to lexicalized_only unless independent evidence establishes a broader productive 話/講 + participant + cognition-predicate class; retain the exact sequence and its boundaries"}

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"overlapping","terminology_alignment":"misleading","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":["generic_head_requires_boundary_definition"],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy label assigns one semantic reading to a polysemous lexeme and uses the vague head Frame. The executable profile is structural and lexeme-specific: overt subject + 諗住 + VP. NamZyuVPComplementClause makes that boundary searchable and preserves the intention reading as source-linked interpretation metadata rather than permanent identity. Status recommendation: retain research_pending under the neutral form-based name; preserve intention, thought, assumption, and planning readings as unresolved lexical-semantic alternatives rather than encoding intention categorically"}

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_broader","terminology_alignment":"misleading","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":["semantic_domain_name_requires_structural_scope_check"],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ScalarEvaluation is substantially broader than the evidenced construction and risks reviving the retired price-domain ontology. The supported path is overt 唔算 with a property predicate, optionally in a topic or 都-marked context. M4SyunPropertyEvaluation makes that lexical marker explicit and preserves scalarity as interpretation metadata rather than a license for unrelated scalar structures. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the source-linked 唔算 + property predicate profile; audit and quarantine category-compatible predicate extensions that lack direct evidence before any promotion review"}

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_narrower_defensible","terminology_alignment":"theory_loaded","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":[],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The construction is a genuine surface subtype, but headless can imply a specific ellipsis or null-noun analysis that Canto Span explicitly does not assert. DemonstrativeClassifierNPWithoutOvertNoun names the observable sequence and cleanly contrasts it with AB15 DemonstrativeClassifierNounNP without reconstructing omitted material. Status recommendation: retain research_pending and quarantine from promotion until at least one stronger independent source, exact source-linked positives, discourse-sensitive negative boundaries, corpus review, and role-neutral panel evidence are available"}

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_broader","terminology_alignment":"neutral_descriptive_preferred","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":[],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ANotAQuestion is a legitimate linguistic family name, but the current UUID combines canonical V-唔-V forms, embedded interrogatives, and suppletive 有冇 sequences. M4MarkedANotAInterrogative preserves the strongest shared overt structure and makes the negator boundary searchable. Suppletive and lexeme-specific profiles must not inherit its evidence automatically. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the overt V-唔-V profile; remove suppletive 有冇 from this UUID during compatibility migration and allocate or reuse a separate source-bounded 有冇 interrogative identity"}

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_broader","terminology_alignment":"neutral_descriptive_preferred","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":[],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. CompletionQuestion is defensible as a semantic description but hides the overt markers that provide its actual source authorization. AspectMarkedMeiCompletionQuestion makes the formal boundary explicit and prevents the unsupported bare-VP route from inheriting the evidence. Predicate-object compatibility remains a separate semantic-selection concern. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the visibly completion- or aspect-marked profile; quarantine bare VP + 未 until independently sourced and keep semantic selection review separate from construction recognition"}

records.next_best_action: complete source-scope reaudit and split any unsupported extensions

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_broader","terminology_alignment":"neutral_descriptive_preferred","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":[],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. CompletionVP is too broad because its current positives combine the source-supported V + 完 predicate with 晒, outer 咗, final-未 questions, negation, and larger clause-linking contexts. The outer structures may contain the same V + 完 constituent without belonging to its permanent identity. WanMarkedCompletionVP retains the dominant source-supported core while preventing 晒 and unrelated completion markers from inheriting its evidence. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the V + 完 completion profile; remove 晒 and other marker-specific branches from this UUID during compatibility migration and keep the native-conflicted V完咗O composition under the project's higher-burden evidence rule"}

records.next_best_action: complete source-scope reaudit and split any unsupported extensions

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_broader","terminology_alignment":"neutral_descriptive_preferred","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":[],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy name does not distinguish postverbal manner adjustment from standalone scalar directives. Three executable positives instantiate a coherent and directly attested V + property + 啲 profile, while the remaining positives lack an overt modified verb. PostverbalDiMannerAdjustmentVP retains the source-supported core and prevents directive or discourse-unit evidence from being transferred into the adverbial construction. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the postverbal V + property + 啲 profile; move standalone or elliptical property + 啲 outputs to independently adjudicated profiles during compatibility migration"}

records.next_best_action: complete source-scope reaudit and split any unsupported extensions

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"runtime_broader","terminology_alignment":"neutral_descriptive_preferred","recommended_action":"rename_retain_narrow","automatic_risk_flags":["generic_head_requires_boundary_definition"],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DegreeStativePredicate contains a strong and repeatedly tested 好 + property-predicate core, but its runtime positives also include wh-duration, wh-quantity, and nominal-modifier material. HouMarkedPropertyPredicate identifies the dominant source-supported construction without claiming that all degree expressions are stative predicates. The same UUID is retained for the 好-marked predicative core; unrelated branches require independent homes. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for overt 好 + property predication; remove wh-quantity, duration, nominal-modifier, and other unrelated degree branches during compatibility migration"}

ontology_conflicts_resolved.detail: {"review_state":"complete","behavior_research_alignment":"disjoint","terminology_alignment":"misleading","recommended_action":"internalize_and_decompose","automatic_risk_flags":[],"review_notes":"Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The runtime grouping is useful only as historical compatibility metadata. It should cease competing for linguistic promotion and decompose into independently supported object, quantity, predicate, and duration structures. PassivePermissiveRelation treats distinct constructions and context-dependent interpretations as one language-level relation.
